attacking_style: Late-stage accelerations on summit finishes, often inside 300-500m, and mid-stage GC group attacks for damage limitation. Tactical rather than explosive, prioritizing positioning over raw power.
team_tactics: Vulnerable to isolation when separated from team support; 2019 mechanical and 2022 Giro positioning losses reveal insufficient domestique protection in critical moments. Team appears reactive rather than controlling tempo.
terrain_preference: Steady, attritional mountain stages suit best; lacks explosive acceleration for early detonations. Thrives in two-week Grand Tour rhythm (peaked at Tour week 2). Exposed when Bora/aggressive teams detonate races early.
vulnerability: Lacks sharp acceleration when races explode early; fades from breakaways in final climbs (2021 Vuelta pattern). Form deficits manifest as late-race fade. Prone to isolation costing 30+ seconds in positioning errors.
key_patterns: Peaks at two-week mark in Grand Tours; jumped to 2nd GC at Tour week 2.
KOM classification hunter; prioritized points over stage results across four 2020 Vuelta stages.
Fades from breakaways on final climbs when form lacking; occurred twice in 2021 Vuelta.
Positioning errors cost 30+ seconds; isolated in 2022 Giro lost extra 33 seconds to GC group.
Mature resource management; abandoned KOM collection in rain with commanding 51-point lead.
Late summit attacks inside 300-500m signature move but requires gaps to survive closures.
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 recovery from long COVID showed preparation but no results. 2022 inconsistent with top-10 move but acceleration deficits. 2021 serious form deficit evident.
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 10
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 7
